item.g:title: Ultrasonic Pest Repellent – Rechargeable Indoor Outdoor Device for Pets for Small Pets – Waterproof Protection
item.g:description: *Features*: *Upgraded Ultrasonic Repeller*:Tired of dealing with the hassle and potential risks posed by bats nesting in your attic,birds roosting on your porch or patio,or mice/dogs lingering through your kitchen,garage,or camping gear? This ultrasonic bat repellent is engineered to be your all-in-one solution,deterring these animals effectively. Creates an inhospitable environment for them and lets you enjoy your space without unwanted guests. *3 Ultrasonic Speakers & 6 Adjustable Ultrasonic Frequencies*:Adopting advanced 8-36KHz ultrasonic wave range and 3 ultrasonic speakers,this pest control device disrupts bats' ability to navigate, interferes with mice communication and instincts, disturbs birds' natural foraging or nesting behaviors,and annoys dogs with uncomfortable high-frequency sounds to drive them away from your property. The 6 adjustable levels let you fine-tune the performance based on the severity of the pest issue or the size of the area—whether you're dealing with a mild bird problem on your patio, a persistent mouse presence in your garage, bats nesting in your attic, or stray dogs lingering around your yard, you can easily select the optimal setting. *900mAh Rechargeable Battery*: Equipped with a 900mAh rechargeable battery, this rechargeable bird repellent offers an impressive runtime of 70 hours, ensuring long-lasting protection without the hassle of frequent recharges. Suitable for indoors and outdoors, whether you're at home or camping outdoor. *Up To 2055Sq.ft Coverage*:With coverage of up to 2055 square feet,this ultrasonic mouse repeller safeguards large areas and can be placed tabletop or wall mounted,making it ideal for rooms,garages,sheds,or even outdoor spots like patios and campsites—keeping pests at bay wherever you need it. *Safe & Humane*:No chemicals,poisons or odors. This ultrasonic bat deterrent offers a humane pest control solution that drives away bats,birds,and mice without causing them harm. Also safe for kids and women. Friendly Reminder: 1. The repeller should be installed at 80-120cm/31.5-47.24in away from the floor and vertical to the floor. The height will achieve the best effect. 2. Clean the repeller with dry and soft cloth instead of strong impregnant,water or damp cloth. 3. Dropping and striking should be avoided. 4. To increase the effect,one room one repeller is recommended. And for larger rooms like warehouses,two or more repellers will be needed. 5. Please don't worried that the mice and vermin will increase at the beginning,because they are trying to run away from your house after hearing the ultrasonic sound. 6. This product is mainly designed for repelling bats,birds,mice and dogs. While it may deter other pests,effectiveness is most pronounced for these four. 7. It is not recommended for pets like:hamsters,gerbils,guinea pigs,tarantulas,chinchilla,and other rodent-type pets. 8. Please use the repeller continuously for 2-4 weeks to achieve obvious results. 9. This device is not waterproof. If you use it outdoors,please mount it under shade. *Specifications*: Product Type: Ultrasonic Bat Repellent Color: White Material: ABS Quantity: 2Pcs Rated Voltage: 5V Rated Power: 1W Ultrasonic Frequency: 8-36KHz, 6 Adjustable Levels Coverage: Within 90 Sq.m/2055 Sq.ft Built-in Battery: 1Pc 3.7V 900mAh Polymer Battery Charging Time: Around 2H Runtime: Around 70H Charging Cable Length: 29cm/11.42in Per Item Size: 6.5×3×10cm/2.56×1.18×3.94in Per Item Weight: 85g/0.19 lbs 2Pcs Package Size: 13x11x8cm/5.12x4.33x3.15in 2Pcs Package Weight: 240g/0.53lbs *Package Lists*: 2x Rechargeable Bats Exclusion Devices 2x Micro USB Cables 1x User Manual

It helps keep the pet's paw pads soft, protects the sebaceous glands on their paws, and moisturizes and soothes the skin. The application is simple: first, clean and dry your pet's paws, then apply an appropriate amount of the balm to the paws and gently massage to promote absorption. After use, your pet's paws will become softer, effectively shielding them from rain, dust, and other external damage, keeping their paw pads smooth and healthy.

item.g:title: Automatic Pet Water Fountain – 4.5L Cordless Rechargeable Dispenser for Dogs & Cats for Cats – Travel Ready
item.g:description: *Features*: *Dual-Tank Filtration System*:This automatic pet water dispenser features separate clean water and wastewater tanks with a self-refilling ceramic bowl. The innovative circulation system continuously provides fresh,hygienic drinking water for your pets,ensuring they always have access to clean hydration. *Smart Automation Features*:Utilizing advanced intelligent timing technology,this pet fountain offers customizable drainage cycles at 3/6/9-hour intervals. With adjustable refill volumes of 80/100/120ML per cycle,the system significantly reduces maintenance efforts while ensuring optimal hydration for your pets. *User-Friendly Operation*:Featuring simple button controls,this water station activates with a 3-5 second press and hold of the power button. The intuitive interface allows easy water volume and refill timing adjustments through icon buttons,complemented by convenient remote control access for effortless settings management. The bottom designed with 8Pcs silicone pads to keep the device stable and prevent slipping. *Generous 4.5L Capacity*:Designed with a spacious 1.2-gallon freshwater tank,this hydration station provides ample drinking supply for daily pet needs. The substantial volume makes it ideal for multiple cats and small to medium-sized dog breeds,reducing refill frequency. Besides,low noise design will not disturb your pets. *Cordless Rechargeable Design*:Powered by a built-in 2200mAh battery,this portable water fountain operates up to 15 days after a 2-hour full charge. The wireless construction allows flexible placement anywhere in your home while eliminating concerns about pets chewing power cords. The detachable parts and included cleaning brush ensures easy cleaning. Charging Indicator * Charging:Solid red indicator light * Fully Charged:Red indicator light turns off * Low Battery Reminder:If the device is not charged for an extended period and the battery level falls below the threshold(about 10%-15%),the indicator light will flash red(at a frequency of about once per second) to remind you to charge it in time. *Specifications*: Product Type: Automatic Pet Water Fountain Color: Creamy Material: ABS Shell, Ceramic Bowl, Stainless Steel Hose Adapter Voltage: 100-240V Input: 5V/2A Power: 5W Battery: Built-in 2200mAh Rechargeable Battery(Battery not for individual use) Charging Time: 2H Runtime: About 15 Days(Depends on actual use) Standby Time: 180 Days Remote Control Powered By: Built-in 1Pc CR2025 Button Cell(Battery not for individual use) Remote Control Distance: About 2m/6.56ft Refill Water Timer: 3H, 6H, 9H Refill Water Volume: 80ml/2.71oz; 100ml/3.38oz; 120ml/4.06oz Clean Water Tank Capacity: 4.5L/1.2Gal Waste Water Tank Capacity: 2L/0.53Gal Cleaning Brush Size: 24x5cm/9.45x1.97in Type-C USB Cable Length: 1.5m/59in/4.92ft Assembled Item Size: 24x28x23cm/9.45x11.02x9.06in Assembled Item Weight: 1382g/3.05lbs Package Size: 24x15x24cm/9.45x5.91x9.45in Package Weight: 1718g/3.79lbs *Package Lists*: 1 x Main Machine With Clean Water Tank 1 x Clean Water Tank Lid 1 x Waste Water Tank 1 x Waste Water Tank Lid 1 x Ceramic Water Bowl 1 x Type-C USB Charging Cable 1 x Adapter 1 x Remote Control 1 x Cleaning Brush 1 x User Manual

item.g:title: Dog Bed – Orthopedic Dog Bed – Elevated Cooling Cot for Large & Medium Dogs – Joint & Hip Support | Large
item.g:description: Because your dog deserves comfort — even on the hottest days. Is your dog panting through summer, avoiding hot floors, or waking up stiff and sore? The Elevated Cooling Dog Bed is an orthopedic raised cot designed to keep your dog cool, comfortable, and supported — indoors or outdoors. Cooling Airflow System Unlike traditional beds that trap heat, this elevated dog cot lifts your pet off the ground, promoting 360° airflow underneath. The breathable mesh fabric dissipates body heat naturally — no batteries, no gels, just smart engineering for a cooling dog bed that actually works. Orthopedic Joint Support The raised dog bed design distributes your dog's weight evenly across the mesh surface, relieving pressure on hips, elbows, and spine. Veterinarians recommend elevated beds for dogs with arthritis, hip dysplasia, or post-surgery recovery. This is real orthopedic support without the bulk. item.g:description: *Features*: * Wireless Dog Fencing System *: This wireless dog fence system can keep your pet in a safe and secure area by creating a circular boundary around a transmitter using radio waves instead of a physical fence. It helps your pets shape the habit of living within the designated area and keep your furniture and daily necessities clean and tidy. It can be applied to dog training at home or in garden. * Automatic Dog Training *: The transmitter emits a harmless radio signal in a radius around itself and the signal is detected by the collar. If your dog walks out of the signal boundary,the receiver will send sound warning first and then emit safe static stimulation until the dog goes back into the signal boundary. In this way,your pet will gradually recognize the existence of fence boundaries and learn to stop at the warning signal. * Adjustable Boundary Range & Shock Level *: You can customize the 4-level adjustable radius of the boundary from 131ft to 722ft,suitable for both indoor and outdoor usage. item.g:description: *Features*: * 3 Training Modes *: Our dog receive collar has 3 extremely efficient and safe training modes(beep,vibration and static shock modes) for you to cultivate a dog basic obedience commands and correct your dog’s inappropriate behaviors. You could feel free to train your dog in both in the park,backyard and different rooms. * Wide Applications *: Suitable for pet(6 Month+;Neck Circumference under 25.98in);Weight among 22lbs to 110lbs). Smooth contact points rest gently against your pet's skin to deliver correction when needed. It is recommend use 2-3 times a week when you not use shock function. Our remote training collar strap has reflective coating on the surface, which will reflect the surrounding LED light at night, protecting your dog from traffic accidents and helping you locate your dog. * Long Standby Time *: Our bark collar is rechargeable. About 2 hours rapid charging, standby time of receiver and transmitter up to 15days. Designed with 2 in 1 charging cable, can be conveniently charged via PC, phone charger, laptop, or power bank. Note: Adapter not included. Warm Notes: *Proper fit of the collar is important! A collar worn for too long or made too tight on the pet's neck may cause skin irritation. The receiver collar should fit snugly yet be sufficiently loose to allow one finger to fit between the strap and your pet’s neck. * Please make sure to use the conductive silicone set,this will protect the dog's skin to a certain extent, but it does not affect the electric shock function. * Avoid leaving the collar on the dog for more than 18 hours per day. If possible, reposition the collar on the pet's neck every 1 to 2 hours. * We suggest not using the shock function except in an emergency. When using the shock function,Level 1 should be tried first and then the level should be gradually increased as necessary. * If the collar is too long,please cut off the excessive portion. It is pretty easy to get a burn edge after the cut. item.g:description: *Features*: * 3 Training Functions with 0-9 Intensity Levels *: Our dog receive collar has 3 extremely efficient and safe training modes(beep,vibration and static shock modes) for you to cultivate a dog basic obedience commands and correct your dog’s inappropriate behaviors. Please start from the lowest level for better accommodation. * Stable Wireless Dog Fence Mode *: Adopt advanced 2.4G frequency technology that consistently provides a more stable and accurate signal transmission from 50ft to 990ft than others. No complicatedly manual pairing operation, they will be automatically paired after power on, and one transmitter can connect with unlimited quantity of receiver collars. When your dog is out of range, the collar will trigger 5S sound, 5S vibration and 6S shock, after 2 cycles of this, we have “didi” sound, emit until they return to the setting distance. After 5min of electric shock, it will enter to standby mode. * Rechargeable & Long Standby Time *: Built-in 2500mAh rechargeable battery of transmitter achieves 3-5days working after about 3-4hours fully charged. And 500mAh rechargeable collar enables up to 15days standby time(depends on using frequency) after about 1-2hours charging. Come with 2-in-1 type-c charging cable and adapter, can be conveniently charged via PC, phone charger, laptop, or power bank. * IPX6 Waterproof Collar Receiver *: With well-sealed silicone, the training collar emits IPX6 outstanding waterproof performance, offering your pets maximum flexibility during outdoor activities. Make sure that the charging port is well-sealed before the dog runs into water. Reflected strips on the collar make people see your dogs clearly even at night which effectively keep your dog safe. * Wide Applications *: The length of collar can be adjusted from 9.45in to 27.16in to fit most sizes of 6-month+ year old dogs between 15-120LBS. Soft woven fabric collar brings comfortable wearing experience. The colar and system is in low battery, needs to be charged. 3. The receiver has been totally immersed into water for a long time without the charging port well sealed. This will cause malfunction. How can I know the system can work normally? To ensure the system operates normally, follow these detailed testing steps after referring to the instruction video and user manual. item.g:title: Wireless Dog GPS Fence – Waterproof Collar with Tracker for Dogs for Dogs – Waterproof Protection
item.g:description: *Features*: * GPS Wireless Dog Fence *: Our dog fence system utilizes GPS technology to create a virtual boundary for your dog,which allows it to roam freely with the designated area. Require no physical barriers. With the radius can reach up to 2887ft,our wireless dog fence can cover up to 760 acres and offer flexibility,portability,and ease of use compared to traditional fences. * Portable GPS Tracker *: Build in a GPS module that can tracks your dog’s location in real time. After binding the dog GPS locator with your IOS Phone,you can start up the prompt tone and follow the route to find your dog on the e-map. The Lost Mode in the Finder APP is very helpful when it comes to getting lost. If you want bind another phone,the GPS tracker needs to unbind with the first phone as the User Manual describes. Friendly Reminder:The tracker function only fits for IOS14.5/SE/6S and newer version. Also fit for iPad 14.5/Pro/Air 2/Mini 4 and newer version. * 3 Warning Modes *: Once your dog walks out of the boundary,the GPS receiver will beep for 20S,vibrate for 20S and give static shock for 20S. The beep,vibration and shock mode will work by cycle until your dog backs into the established boundary. * USB Rechargeable & Digital Display *: With the 2000mAh inbuilt rechargeable battery,our dog GPS finder keeps standby for 72 hours(3 Days) after fully charged for 4 hours. The digital display screen is easy to read and clearly reminds us when the receiver needs to be recharged. * IPX6 Waterproof & Adjustable Collar *: The durable ABS material and IPX6 waterproof level makes our GPS dog fence greatly extends its service life and allows your dog to play in wet grass or rainy weather. With 23.22in max collar circumference,our GPS collar is suitable for dogs of all sizes and weights. You can easily set up the system in different locations,making it suitable for travel or temporary containment needs. Friendly Reminder: 1. Only suitable for outdoors. 2. It’s important to adjust the collar to properly fit the dog’s neck. If you have to cut off some of the collar,please singe the collar end with a lighter immediately to avoid fraying. 3. For long-haired dogs,please trim some hair on your dog’s neck to ensure good contact of the metal probes. 4. It’s recommended to wear the collar for less than 8 hours per day. If possible,reposition the collar on the pet's neck every 1 to 2 hours. 5. Please keep this dog fence away from children to avoid their playing causing unintended electric shock. 6. The tracker function is only suitable for IOS Phones. If the GPS signal is weak,the tracker may not update your dog’s location as quickly as it was. 7. Only when the signal is good,can the receiver work normally. The GPS signals can be affected by environmental factors such as tall buildings,dense vegetation,or bad weather. It is important to consider these factors when setting up the system and adjust the boundaries accordingly. 8. Only when the GPS Font and Water Drop Icon disappear on the screen,can we reset or adjust the radius. 9. Test is essential before putting the receiver on your dog’s neck. 10. Proper training is essential to ensure that the dog understands the boundaries and responds appropriately to the warning signals. *Specifications*: Product Type: Dog GPS Fence & Tracker Materials: ABS + PU Color: Black Inbuilt Battery: 3.7V 2000mAh Rechargeable Battery(Battery is not for individual sale) Voltage: 110V Boundary Radius: 10-990M/32-2887FT(32FT Adjustment Each Time) Maximum Area Coverage: 760 Acres(Circular, 990M Radius) 3 Training Modes: Beep Mode/Vibration Mode/Static Shock Mode Tracker Supported APP: Fit for IOS Phone Finder Fully Charged Time: Around 4Hrs Standby Time: Around 72Hrs (Depending On Usage Frequency) Waterproof Level: IPX6 Charging Cable Length: 31.5cm/12.4in Collar Length: 59cm/23.22in/1.93ft GPS Receiver Size: 7 x4.8 x3cm/2.76 x1.89 x 1.18in GPS Receiver Weight: 88g/0.2 lbs Package Size: 18*14*5cm/7.09*5.51*1.97in Package Weight: 194g/0.43lbs *Package Lists*: 1 x GPS Receiver 1 x Adjustable Collar 1 x Charging Cable 2x Short Metal Probes 2x Long Metal Probes 2x Short Conductive Silicone Caps 2x Long Conductive Silicone Caps 1 x Test Bulb 2x User Manuals
